name: Core Crusher
description: Targeted core workout for abs, obliques and lower back

exercises.name: Plank
instructions: Place forearms on the ground with elbows under shoulders
Extend legs back and rise onto your toes
Keep body in a straight line from head to heels
Hold position while breathing steadily
exercises.formTip: Keep body in a straight line, squeeze glutes

exercises.name: Crunch
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat
Place hands behind your head lightly
Curl upper body toward your knees exhaling at the top
Lower back down with control
exercises.formTip: Curl up controlled, exhale at the top

exercises.name: Lying Leg Raise
instructions: Lie flat on your back with legs straight
Keep legs together and raise them toward the ceiling
Lower legs slowly without touching the ground
Keep lower back pressed firmly into the floor
exercises.formTip: Keep lower back pressed into floor

exercises.name: Russian Twist
instructions: Sit with knees bent and feet off the floor
Lean back slightly keeping your spine straight
Rotate your torso from side to side
Keep movement controlled from the waist
exercises.formTip: Rotate from the waist, keep feet off the ground

exercises.name: Mountain Climber
instructions: Start in a high plank position
Drive one knee toward your chest
Alternate legs with quick controlled movements
Keep hips level and core engaged throughout
exercises.formTip: Keep hips level, drive knees to opposite elbow

exercises.name: Bicycle Crunch
instructions: Lie on your back with hands behind your head
Bring opposite elbow to opposite knee
Extend the other leg straight out
Alternate sides in a pedaling motion

exercises.name: Mountain Climber
instructions: Start in high plank position with hands under shoulders
Drive one knee toward your chest rapidly
Alternate legs in a fast running motion
Keep hips low and core engaged
exercises.formTip: Hold plank, drive knees to chest fast
